arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs Arsenal – Match Preview
arts.sum: One of the Premier League’s most hotly anticipated fixtures occurs this weekend, as Tottenham Hotspur host Arsenal in the first North London Derby of the campaign. This fierce rivalry always promises melodrama and ferocity and Sunday’s game has all the usual stakes and ingredients that make this derby so entertaining. arts.ttl: Van Persie: 9-1 loss evokes Man Utd 8-2 Arsenal
arts.sum: Heerenveen head coach Robin van Persie said that his team's 9-1 defeat to AZ Alkmaar reminds him of Arsenal's 8-2 to Manchester United in 2011.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted XI vs Tottenham as Martin Odegaard option forces formation decision
arts.sum: football.london takes a look at how Mikel Arteta could line his Arsenal side up for the North London Derby against Tottenham Mikel Arteta might be trying to play things down, but this is a huge week for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus tipped to QUIT Arsenal
arts.sum: Former Premier League striker Dean Saunders believes that it is only a matter of time before Jesus asks to leave Arsenal. “I keep thinking to myself, how long is Jesus going to put up with not playing?,” Saunders said on TalkSport.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta knows the simple truths at centre of Arsenal's most-pivotal week
arts.sum: Arsenal face an already-seemingly crucial week in their season, with Tottenham on Saturday, the Champions League in midweek and a trip to Manchester City next weekend

arts.ttl: Euro giants set to scout Arsenal star in the NLD ahead of a potential move
arts.sum: Real Madrid are always on the lookout for players who can further bolster their squad. While they do have a star-studded squad with nearly every position well-covered, Los Blancos are on the lookout for their next big defensive star. arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'scouting' Arsenal, Tottenham defenders as £84.5m decision made
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly send their chief scout to run the rule over Arsenal's William Saliba and Tottenham Hotspur's Cristian Romero in the North London derby.

arts.ttl: Bentancur debate, Johnson starts in Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Guest's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Van de Ven, Udogie; Bentancur, Sarr, Maddison; Johnson, Solanke, Son. Spurs have certainly been given some welcome news regarding Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke going into this weekend's North London Derby.

arts.ttl: Tottenham to offer key star significant pay rise amid interest from Euro giants
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur defender Cristian Romero has been linked with a move away from the club. The Argentine international joined Tottenham on loan in 2021 and the North London club signed him permanently in 2022 for a fee of around £40 million. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Arsenal starting lineups: Gunners decide on injured duo as Spurs handed boost
arts.sum: The first North London derby of the season sees Arsenal aim to keep their unbeaten start to the season alive without the suspended Declan Rice after his red card against Brighton
